steps.goal: Gather information and formulate a concise explanation of what Open-Eywa is, including its core concepts and purpose, suitable for an operator briefing.
steps.title: Research "What is Open-Eywa?"

steps.goal: Investigate and explain the rationale behind Open-Eywa's design choice to make the node the durable unit of work. This explanation should cover the benefits and implications for operators.
steps.title: Research "Why is the node the durable unit of work in Open-Eywa?"

steps.goal: Determine and list the most critical mission files that a human operator should inspect first when interacting with an Open-Eywa mission, providing a brief justification for each.
steps.title: Identify "Which mission files should a human inspect first in Open-Eywa?"

steps.goal: Combine the information gathered in Step 1, Step 2, and Step 3 into a coherent, short operator briefing document about Open-Eywa, addressing all three required parts. The briefing should be clear, concise, and actionable for an operator.
steps.title: Synthesize Open-Eywa Operator Briefing
